rationale: The det check requires proving r1 == r2 (spec equality) for ID = EndPoint { id: Vec<u8> } given only that r1@ == r2@ (where view = AbstractEndPoint{id: self.id@}). Confirmed via standalone tests that Verus's spec equality on Vec<u8> is strictly stronger than view (Seq) equality: r1@ == r2@ does NOT imply r1 == r2, and there is no axiom in vstd (group_vec_axioms, lemma_vec_obeys_view_eq, =~=, =~~=) that bridges view equality to structural Vec equality. DelegationMap::get is #[verifier::external_body] with only view-based ensures, so the obligation is fundamentally unprovable without additional axioms.
